nonGoals: Do not touch any other specs/ files
Do not change README or any code
objective: Delete duplicate specs/VISION.md — docs/VISION.md is canonical
planText: Delete the file specs/VISION.md. Confirm docs/VISION.md exists and remains the single canonical copy. Run npm run build:web to verify no broken references (e.g. import or link to the deleted file).

nonGoals: Do not change any other docs/ files
Do not alter process/workflow logic or structure
planText: Update docs/voice-discovery-process.md: replace '130 voices' with '550 voices', replace '8 providers' with '25 providers'. Cross-reference CLAUDE.md for any outdated script names, workflow steps, or tool references and refresh them. Run npm run build:web to confirm no regressions.

nonGoals: Do not modify any code, config, or infra files
Do not change CLAUDE.md, PRD.md, or any docs/ file
Do not add or remove actual project files — docs-only change
objective: Rewrite README.md to reflect current architecture, stack, layout, commands, docs, CI/CD, and add live URLs + Node version + feature sections
planText: Ground-truth README.md against CLAUDE.md. Update §Stack: replace 'Catalog data: app-owned module (phase 1), API-backed later' with static voices.json catalog, SAM-deployed Synthesis API (9 provider adapters), Amplify Gen2 backend (Cognito + AppSync + DynamoDB), S3 audio storage. Update §Repo Layout: replace packages/shared with packages/sdk (@vokda/sdk); add sdks/, scripts/, specs/, extensions/ directories. Update §Quick Start: add Node >=20 prerequisite, npm run dev:api, npm test, npm run check:web, npm run build:web, npm run build:sdk. Update §Product Docs: expand from ~7 entries to full list — VISION.md, DISCOVERY.md, SYNTHESIS_API.md, VOICE_CATALOG_EXPORT.md, GITHUB_SETUP.md, AMPLIFY_SETUP.md, voice-discovery-process.md, and note subdirectories. Update §CI/CD: add specific checks (typecheck, Svelte check, catalog freshness, build). Add new sections: Live URLs (app + API endpoints), Node version requirement block (>=20), and a brief synthesis/SSML/steering feature mention. Run npm run build:web to confirm no regressions.
